data.title: LAYER now launches Save Finance lending protocol
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LAYER (Solayer) has now launched the Save Finance (formerly Solend) lending protocol. Users can use LAYER for mortgage lending to earn high returns.

data.title: A whale transferred 624.4 ETH to Kraken after 3 years of silence
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited the last 624.4 ETH (US$1.14 million) held by it into Kraken after being silent for 3 years. 8 years ago, the whale spent US$25,000 to obtain 3,271 ETH from Kraken and The DAO, making a profit of US$4.24 million.

data.title: The US dollar index DXY fell below 102 for the first time since October last year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Market data shows that the US dollar index DXY fell below 102 for the first time since October last year, with a daily drop of 1.67%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Barclays sees 'high' risk of U.S. recession this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Barclays believes that the risk of the US economy falling into recession this year is "high". (Jinshi)

data.title: Soneium Sony Chain announced that it will use L2 sorter revenue to repurchase ASTR tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Startale Group announced that it will use the proceeds of the sequencer of Soneium, the Ethereum L2 blockchain jointly developed by it and Sony Group, to purchase ASTR tokens in the market to further promote the ecological integration of Soneium and Astar and the merger of future assets.
It is reported that Soneium is an Ethereum L2 developed and operated by Sony Block Solution Labs (jointly held by Sony headquarters and Startale) and led by Astar founder Sota Watanabe. Its Sequencer is responsible for transaction sorting, packaging and submission to Ethereum L1, while charging transaction fees.

data.title: Bitget will launch StakeStone (STO) spot trading at 18:30 today
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget will launch StakeStone (STO) in the Innovation Zone, DeFi Zone and LSD Zone. The recharge channel is now open, and the trading channel will be open at 18:30 (UTC+8) on April 3.
StakeStone is a decentralized full-chain liquidity infrastructure protocol that aims to change the way liquidity is acquired, distributed and utilized in various blockchain ecosystems.

data.title: Gate.io will launch StakeStone (STO) spot trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch StakeStone (STO) spot trading at 18:30 (UTC+8) on April 3, 2025.

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches STO
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official page, Binance Alpha has launched STO (StakeStone).

data.title: US Stablecoin Bill Committee Passed
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News After 10 hours of debate, the U.S. House of Representatives Financial Services Committee passed the Stablecoin Act, which will establish a strict regulatory framework for payment stablecoins, requiring issuers to obtain federal or state approval and be backed by highly liquid assets 1:1.
Democratic lawmakers strongly criticized the Trump family's recently announced World Liberty Financial project for planning to issue stablecoin USD1. Representative Maxine Waters called it "a clear manifestation of greed and corruption" and questioned whether the president's push to relax crypto regulation while being involved in the industry constituted a conflict of interest.
Despite the controversy, the bill was supported by 6 Democratic lawmakers. Trump has promised to make the United States a "crypto superpower" and urged Congress to pass the Stablecoin Act and the Crypto Market Structure Act by the end of the year. The first hearing on the Market Structure Act is scheduled for April 9. (DLnews)

data.title: BitMart will launch StakeStone (STO)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch StakeStone (STO) at 18:30 (Eastern Time) on April 3, and the STO/USDT trading pair will be launched.
StakeStone is a decentralized liquidity infrastructure protocol designed to enhance the staking and liquidity distribution of blockchain networks. Our innovative solutions for staking assets such as ETH and BTC can achieve efficient liquidity redistribution while providing users with optimized returns.
